title: Take Apart Dino Truck Monster Vehicle Toy Set, 4 Colours Available, Ages 3+, with Assembly Tool
features: INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Take-apart dinosaur monster truck toy that can be assembled and disassembled using the included blue tool, perfect for hands-on play
VARIETY: Available in four striking colours - red, brown, green and blue - each featuring a fierce dinosaur head design with detailed sculpting
MONSTER WHEELS: Equipped with large, durable wheels with yellow hubs for excellent rolling action and stability on various surfaces
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 3 years and above, offering both entertainment and developmental benefits
CONSTRUCTION: Sturdy build with removable parts that snap together securely, featuring detailed dinosaur texturing and decorative accents
description: Product Description Unleash prehistoric playtime excitement with these Take Apart Dino Trucks from Dino Discovery! Each monster truck features a fearsome dinosaur head design with impressive details like fierce eyes and menacing teeth. Available in four striking colours - bold red, cool blue, mighty green, and classic brown - these robust vehicles combine the thrill of dinosaurs with monster truck action. The set includes a special assembly tool that lets children take apart and rebuild their dino truck, enhancing both motor skills and creative play. The trucks feature large, chunky wheels with yellow hubs for excellent rolling action on various surfaces. Perfect for young dinosaur enthusiasts aged 3 and up, these vehicles are built to withstand energetic play sessions. The oversized wheels and sturdy construction ensure these prehistoric powerhouses can handle any imaginary terrain your little one creates. Each truck maintains the perfect balance of being both playful and slightly fierce, making them ideal for creative storytelling and action-packed adventures. Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable for children under 36 months- Choking Hazard - Small Parts
